content.text:
Staged changes: DevPod iptables preflight fallback and bootstrap runner tests. Committing and pushing.

[REDACTED]

input.command:
cd /workspaces/agno && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(domain-driven): sudo iptables preflight fallback and bootstrap runner tests

Try sudo -n when unprivileged iptables fails in DinD preflight, and add unit coverage for DomainBootstrapRunner.run_async.
EOF
)"
input.description: Commit staged changes with message

content.text:
Pre-commit failed on mypy. Checking how similar tests handle those imports.

[REDACTED]

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && uv run mypy tests/agents/domain_driven/test_bootstrap_runner.py 2>&1
input.description: Run mypy on failing test file

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git show HEAD:agents/domain_driven/runner.py 2>&1 | head -5; ls -la agents/domain_driven 2>&1
input.description: Check if domain_driven agents exist in git

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git diff HEAD --name-only && git ls-files agents/domain_driven domain-driven 2>/dev/null; ls -la domain-driven 2>/dev/null | head -20
input.description: Find domain_driven tracked files

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git status -u && ls -la agents/domain_driven/__pycache__/ 2>/dev/null; find agents -name '*domain*' 2>/dev/null
input.description: Check for untracked domain_driven agent code

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git log --oneline --all -- agents/domain_driven/ | head -10; git show 092c699 --name-only | head -40
input.description: Check git history for domain_driven agents

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git stash list; git branch -a | grep domain; find . -path './agents/domain_driven/*.py' 2>/dev/null
input.description: Search for domain_driven source files

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && uv run pytest tests/agents/domain_driven/test_bootstrap_runner.py -q 2>&1
input.description: Verify test imports work

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git ls-tree -r origin/domain-driven --name-only | grep domain_driven
input.description: List domain_driven files on remote branch

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git status --ignored agents/domain_driven 2>&1; cat .gitignore | grep -i domain; ls -la agents/domain_driven/
input.description: Check if domain_driven sources are gitignored

content.text:
The test references missing `agents/domain_driven` sources. Checking whether we can recover them from the prior implementation session.

[REDACTED]

input.command:
cd /workspaces/agno && python3 -c "
import dis, marshal, struct, time
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('agents/domain_driven/__pycache__/runner.cpython-313.pyc')
if p.exists():
    data = p.read_bytes()
    # skip header (16 bytes for 3.7+)
    code = marshal.loads(data[16:])
    print('names:', code.co_names[:20])
    print('consts with str:', [c for c in code.co_consts if isinstance(c, str)][:5])
" 2>&1
input.description: Inspect runner.pyc bytecode metadata

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && uv run pip install decompyle3 -q 2>/dev/null; uv run decompyle3 agents/domain_driven/__pycache__/runner.cpython-313.pyc 2>&1 | head -80
input.description: Try decompiling runner.pyc to recover source

content.text:
<user_query>
don't recover them, they have been intentionally removed
</user_query>

Understood — skipping recovery. Committing only the valid `ssh_bootstrap` change and unstaging the test that references the removed modules.

[REDACTED]

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git status && git diff --staged
input.description: Check current staged changes

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git restore --staged tests/agents/domain_driven/test_bootstrap_runner.py && rm -f tests/agents/domain_driven/test_bootstrap_runner.py && rmdir tests/agents/domain_driven 2>/dev/null; git status
input.description: Unstage and remove orphaned test file

input.command:
cd /workspaces/agno && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(devpod): try sudo when unprivileged iptables check fails

DinD preflight now falls back to sudo -n for the nat table probe when the direct iptables call is unavailable.
EOF
)"
input.description: Commit ssh_bootstrap preflight fix

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git push -u origin HEAD && git status
input.description: Push commit to origin

content.text:
Committed and pushed to `origin/domain-driven`.

**Commit:** `b313c5d` — `fix(devpod): try sudo when unprivileged iptables check fails`

The DinD preflight now tries `sudo -n iptables` when the unprivileged `iptables` call fails.

I left out `tests/agents/domain_driven/test_bootstrap_runner.py` — it imported the intentionally removed `agents.domain_driven` modules and would have failed mypy and pytest. That file was unstaged and deleted locally; the working tree is clean.

[REDACTED]
